title: Robust Umami Peruvian Fish Ceviche Clasico
description: A traditional Peruvian dish with a twist, featuring unwaxed lemon and double-rise-bread for added crunch and flavor, this ceviche clasico is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and packed with umami taste.
instructions: Cut the halibut fillets into small pieces and place them in a large kadhai.
Squeeze the unwaxed lemon juice over the fish, making sure each piece is coated.
Add the crushed double-rise-bread, sliced red onion, chopped aji amarillo pepper, and minced garlic to the kadhai.
Sprinkle the chopped coriander, salt, and black pepper over the top of the mixture.
Gently fold all the ingredients together until they are just combined.
Cover the kadhai with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the fish to 'cook' in the lemon juice.
After 30 minutes, remove the kadhai from the refrigerator and serve the ceviche clasico immediately.
Garnish with additional chopped coriander and crushed double-rise-bread if desired.
